experiences.description: Investigating estrogen receptor-mediated neuroprotection in Alzheimer's disease using the AppNL-G-F mouse model. Performed scRNA-seq analysis, cell-cell communication analysis, and integrated transcriptomic, behavioral, and histological data.

experiences.institution: University of Texas at Austin, USA
experiences.description: Conducted research in biomedical engineering with a focus on advanced molecular and computational approaches.
Teaching undergraduate courses in biochemistry and molecular biology. Performed biochemical and molecular assays including ELISA, PCR, CDNA synthesis.
Performed semen analysis, cryopreservation, and assisted reproductive techniques including intrauterine insemination (IUI).
Assisted in teaching undergraduate courses in biochemistry and molecular biology.
